name: West Balcony
description:
As you open the doors to the balcony, the beautiful smell of  the warm
night fills your soul until your all warm inside. You decide to sit and relax
before doing anything further. You begin to close your eyes, when all of a
sudden you see the most beautiful thing happening in the sky. A flashing
light goes from one side of the dark sky to the other. You finally close your
eyes with happiness and excitement. Knowing that you have just seen a
shooting star, you begin to make a wish...The next morning you wake up and find yourself at the same spot as you were the night before and figured you must
have drifted off to sleep....But as you start to get up, you see something
different, something strange, something new...You noticed that your wish
come true...
